{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220646480CFEEC8B858282193F4F"}"},"total":18900},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7048236892965585700","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，全文看起来是真爽，更新也挺快的，是黑化但不是全黑化，十分好看！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641045534,"group_id":"6922069133861325831","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8BcGIagMv2mks4k8RKngKI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702960&x-signature=tRnwf4v8J2ikrGzX%2B9K6cLn0GrM%3D","user_id":"102698374178","user_name":"丹枫庄园的蕾·斯隆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"102698374178","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6922069133861325831","book_info":{"abstract":"没想到完结三年后，这本书风评突然这么差了，但还是要说一句某站小鬼闹麻了。
书是不看的，风是一定要跟的。
最可悲的是那些曾经看了几十个甚至一百多小时打过的又扭头回来打一星的。
怎么，当时觉得好看，现在觉得不行了？你们不是长大了，是丧失独立思考能力了。
当然，这本书在一些细节上处理的的确不好，这点作者本人是承认的，比如来叶，再比如前十万字。
作者前期是想写一本黑化题材的奥特文，因为当时黑化就是火，和当时奥圈环境有很大关系，作者需要赚钱，自然要跟风黑化。
但这本书的主角又从未完全黑化过（当然这都是后面内容了，你肯定也没看过）
至于奥特阴谋论，那不纯纯玩梗嘛，而且这本书里哪有抹黑过任何一个奥特曼？（特利迦除外），特利迦是纯纯作者把自己观感代入书里了。
多的不说，第一次也是最后一次解释回应。
看书是娱乐，我只能说你开心就好，反正我也退圈了。
最后，感谢一直以来坚定支持本书的读者朋友们！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/d5e32e88a0ed7652072c2e8a292ae4dd","author":"卡恩","author_id":"","book_id":"6922069133861325831","book_name":"奥特:人类背叛？我反手选择黑暗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6922282188197233159","read_count":"31252","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2199792"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1127","tags":"动漫衍生,奥特同人,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,群像,黑化,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/055c26a03aeb53255765e50ddc169c41~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317208&x-signature=nNf64Qh6KxYHN1PSKqu%2F%2Fvxplbg%3D","tomato_book_statu 至于奥特阴谋论，那不纯纯玩梗嘛，而且这本书里哪有抹黑过任何一个奥特曼？（特利迦除外），特利迦是纯纯作者把自己观感代入书里了。

9110296382%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226922069133861325831%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770638755,"group_id":"6922069133861325831","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"江湖相见便是缘。，，，","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/5VUoJdhLmR24X/GUwhshX7wtCDRROY6pY5rZkRlzpv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/929e46fa34a54397867d245ea1e47796~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701256&x-signature=Izx5tTfS3QWj4vh9KE%2BF2%2FHbrYk%3D","user_id":"2560100679813703","user_name":"辉夜常空"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2560100679813703","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6922069133861325831","book_info":{"abstract":"没想到完结三年后，这本书风评突然这么差了，但还是要说一句某站小鬼闹麻了。
